notableEvents.label: LuJames Groover GIDP
notableEvents.detail: LuJames Groover grounds into a double play, second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Kyle Stowers. Geraldo Perdomo out at 2nd. LuJames Groover out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Corbin Carroll plunked
notableEvents.detail: Corbin Carroll hit by pitch. Jorge Barrosa to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Marlins challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Otto Lopez steals (12) 3rd base.

notableEvents.label: Heriberto Hernández pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández flies out to left fielder Tommy Troy.
